title: The War Spreads from the Live Floor to the Roof
description: On pages 9–12, this part focuses on Unknown person #9, Unknown person #10, Luffy, Unknown person #11, Unknown person #12, Kaido as The Onigashima battle spreads from the Live Floor to the rooftop as Drake changes sides, Queen unleashes Ice Oni, and the Scabbards wound Kaido.
scene: The Onigashima battle spreads from the Live Floor to the rooftop as Drake changes sides, Queen unleashes Ice Oni, and the Scabbards wound Kaido.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: Their sword skills are nothing like open...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: So why have I been cut!!?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I can't believe it! I never imagined it was possible to damage him like this!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: that's very nice of you, but no!!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Each of us has his own style!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Isn't "oden two sword style" the coolest? Why don't they wanna learn!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: Fufufu they got into a big squabble..

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Over who is your "Wi retainer" they seem very serious about it!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: They adore so much that they are willing to risk their lives to prove it

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: So when it comes to Ryuou...

summary: This section advances the Wano - The War Spreads Across Onigashima storyline with 34 dialogue beats. The Onigashima battle spreads from the Live Floor to the rooftop as Drake changes sides, Queen unleashes Ice Oni, and the Scabbards wound Kaido.
